changes: Iter 1: Lightened tile sides from dark brown (0x7A6848) to warm taupe (0xC4B8A8), adjusted ambient/hemisphere lighting up for better side visibility, reduced directional light to preserve top face brightness
Iter 2: Reduced wall tile scale (0.88→0.78, 0.95→0.90) for visible gaps between tiles. Darkened side colors (0xC4B8A8→0xB0A088 face-up, 0xA89880→0x9A8A70 face-down) for stronger two-tone contrast

Iter 3: Removed green tile backs (#3B7A5A → #D4C4A0 warm parchment tan). Increased rounded corner bevel (bevelR 0.06→0.10, bevelThickness/Size 0.03→0.05, segments 3→5) for more prominent soft edges matching mockup
notes: Round 4 — polish pass. Green tile backs eliminated. Corners now visibly rounded. Next: compare remaining gaps vs mockup.
